cells.xml_text_content: NOTE: Table reads (for US Totals):  Of all 47,796 public schools with any grade 9-12 (or ungraded), 22,597 (47.3%) offered biology classes.

cells.xml_text_content: Data reported in this table represent 100.0% of responding schools.
